heading: Flag officers
label: 2157 Flag officers
text: During any period in which the Coast Guard is not operating as a service in the Navy, does not apply with respect to flag officers of the Coast Guard.section 1216(d) of title 10
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 296 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 296 of this title
